rawIntent: The Phase 2 architecture specifies creating src/shared/container/index.ts with static imports of concrete service classes (LeaveService, LeaveBalanceService, NotificationService, AuditService) from modules that currently only export service interfaces in this phase; the concrete implementations are deferred to Phases 3 and 4. The container therefore references exports that are unavailable in the current project state. Additionally, src/shared/audit/audit.service.interface.ts imports Employee from ../../modules/employee/employee.model, which is not among the Phase 1 artifacts this phase depends on. Because the requested files contain imports pointing to unavailable exports, the generation phase emits no source files under src/. Preserve all existing exports, types, interfaces, and imports. Only add or modify what is needed to resolve the CI failure shown above.

successCriteria.description: src/shared/container/index.ts can be created without importing unavailable concrete service implementations
src/shared/audit/audit.service.interface.ts can be created without importing Employee from unavailable module
All existing exports, types, interfaces, and imports are preserved
Generation phase emits source files under src/ without errors

constraints: No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled
Preserve all existing exports, types, interfaces, and imports
Only add or modify what is needed to resolve the CI failure
outOfScope: Implementing concrete service classes (LeaveService, LeaveBalanceService, NotificationService, AuditService)
Creating or modifying domain modules (employee, policy, balance, leave, notification)
Changing existing module exports or interfaces
Adding new functionality beyond resolving import issues
